heading: What AI can do right now
subheading: Not predictions. Not demos. These are shipping products.

items.label: Clone your voice from a few seconds of audio
Generate photorealistic video from a text description
Build a slide deck from a single paragraph
Operate your computer — clicking, typing, navigating — autonomously
Purchase anyone's home address, phone number, and employer for under $1
Predict a protein's 3D structure from its amino acid sequence
Translate a live conversation across languages in real time
Write, test, and deploy working software from a description
Identify a stranger's name and history from a photo
